name: Elf
description: Jon Favreau's 2003 holiday classic starring Will Ferrell as a cheerful oversized elf lost in New York City.

questions.q: Who stars as Buddy, the oversized elf, in the 2003 film Elf?

source.notes: Ferrell was post-SNL at the time.

questions.q: Who directed Elf in 2003?

source.notes: Favreau also appears as the doctor testing Buddy's DNA.

questions.q: What is the name of Buddy's grumpy biological father?

source.notes: Walter is a publishing executive.

questions.q: Which Hollywood veteran plays Walter Hobbs in Elf?

source.notes: Caan was best known for The Godfather.

questions.q: Which former child actress plays Buddy's love interest, Jovie?

source.notes: Deschanel later starred in New Girl.

questions.q: At which fictional NYC department store does Buddy take a job?

source.notes: The real Gimbels department store closed in 1987.

questions.q: What is the vibrant color of Buddy's elf costume?

source.notes: Buddy wears the same outfit throughout most of the film.

questions.q: Buddy famously lists the four main food groups of elves. Which of these is one of them?

source.notes: The four groups are candy, candy canes, candy corns, and syrup.

questions.q: Which classic romantic holiday duet does Jovie sing in the shower, inadvertently with Buddy?

source.notes: One of the film's most memorable scenes.

questions.q: How did Buddy end up at the North Pole as a baby?
choices: He was left on Santa's sleigh
He crawled into Santa's gift sack at an orphanage
Elves adopted him in a dream

source.notes: Baby Buddy inadvertently stows away.

questions.q: Which beloved children's TV-classic actor plays Buddy's adoptive elf father, Papa Elf?

source.notes: Bob Newhart; Ed Asner plays Santa.

questions.q: Who plays Santa Claus in Elf?

source.notes: Ed Asner in his second iconic Santa role, before Up (2009).

questions.q: Which city does Buddy travel to in search of his biological father?

source.notes: Walter works at the Empire State Building.

questions.q: What is Buddy's key piece of advice on knowing if a Santa is the real one?
choices: 'You sit on his lap, you know'

source.notes: 'He sits on a throne of lies!'

questions.q: What is the name of Buddy's young half-brother?

source.notes: Played by Daniel Tay.

questions.q: To power Santa's sleigh by the end of the film, crowds in Central Park need to do what?

source.notes: Jovie leads 'Santa Claus Is Coming to Town.'

questions.q: How much did Elf gross worldwide at the box office on a $33 million budget?

source.notes: A huge hit; now a modern Christmas classic.

questions.q: The Christmas-special-style stop-motion scenes at the North Pole pay tribute to which 1964 Rankin/Bass special?
choices: Santa Claus Is Comin' to Town

source.notes: Includes characters inspired by the special (like the snowman narrator).

questions.q: Which Christmas Story alum has a cameo as a cheerful elf/Gimbels employee named Ming Ming?

source.notes: Billingsley is also a longtime Jon Favreau producing collaborator.

questions.q: Who voices Leon the snowman, who shares a scene with Buddy as he walks south?

source.notes: Redbone also sings 'Baby, It's Cold Outside' with Deschanel on the soundtrack.

questions.q: Elf became a Broadway musical in which year?

source.notes: Limited-run musical adaptation, November 2010.

questions.q: In what iconic New York City building does Walter Hobbs's publishing office sit?

source.notes: Buddy arrives at Walter's office there.
